description:
## Problem
`pnpm run format:check` currently FAILS:
```
[warn] .coderabbit.yaml
[warn] Code style issues found in the above file.
```
This blocks the format:check from passing in CI (once CI is properly expanded per the companion ticket). 

## Fix
Run `pnpm run format` to auto-fix the file, then commit the result. Verify `pnpm run format:check` passes cleanly on all files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm run format:check` exits 0 with no warnings
- `.coderabbit.yaml` is committed with correct Prettier formatting
title: Fix Prettier format violation on .coderabbit.yaml
